issue.title: 'Resume' / 'Send to terminal' button on Active Work cards (E7)

phases.title: WorkProgressCard: status-aware Resume/Send-to-terminal primary button
verification: `WorkProgressCard.tsx` exports/uses a module-scope `getResumeAction(status, pipelineStep, issueNumber)` returning `{ label, command } | null` covering pending/reviewing/planning/executing/paused/failed/shipping/completed.
`getResumeAction` returns `null` for `completed`; for `failed` it picks the command by `pipelineStep` (GET→get, PLAN→plan, AUDIT→audit, SHIP→ship, default→execute).
Two `useTerminalStore` selectors are added (`tabsByProject[projectId]` and `terminalByWorkIdByProject[projectId]`), mirroring `IssueDetail.tsx`'s pattern.

`handleResume`: stops event propagation; if no associated terminal → creates a tab via `addTab(projectId)`, calls `associateWorkTerminal(issueNumber, newTabId)`, switches active tab, and surfaces an info toast — does NOT write on this click. If a terminal resolves via `resolveWorkTerminal` → activates the tab, writes the command (with `\r`) via `invoke('write_terminal', { id, data })`, and calls `terminalFocusRegistry.focus`.

The button is rendered only when `isIssue && !showConfirmRemove && resumeAction !== null`; placed as the leftmost in the action row; carries `work-action-btn--primary` className and a tooltip naming the exact command.
Discriminated-union narrowing via the existing direct-ternary-extracted `issueNumber` (no intermediate boolean — per CLAUDE.md TS gotcha).
`WorkProgressCard.css` gains `.work-action-btn--primary` (accent background, white text, hover variant, disabled variant) — existing `.work-action-btn` rule unchanged.
No Rust / IPC / state-shape changes; no new dependencies; no behavior change to existing Pause/Reset/Remove buttons.
`pnpm build` passes (tsc -b strict mode); `pnpm test` is green (89 desktop tests preserved).
Manual smoke verified per the test plan's five scenarios.
phases.summary: Added module-scope getResumeAction(status, pipelineStep, issueNumber) helper, two useTerminalStore selectors (tabsByProject + terminalByWorkIdByProject), and an async handleResume handler in WorkProgressCard.tsx that switches the view to Terminal, creates+associates a tab on first click (info toast) or activates+writes the command via invoke('write_terminal', { id, data: cmd + '\r' }) when an associated terminal already exists. Rendered as the leftmost button in the existing isIssue && !showConfirmRemove action row with className work-action-btn--primary, disabled while status='executing' && phaseStatus in ('executing','running'). Added .work-action-btn--primary CSS (accent fill, accent-hover hover, 0.5 opacity disabled) to WorkProgressCard.css. pnpm build passes (tsc -b strict + vite); pnpm test passes (89 desktop vitest preserved + 65 shared + 28 Rust).
